snippets.C0642:
// Caso: Promedio (clásico) | Nivel: Básico | Categoría: Clásicos
def solve(arr: Seq[Double]): Option[Double] = if (arr.isEmpty) None else Some(arr.sum / arr.size)
snippets.C0643:
// Caso: Suma (clásico) | Nivel: Básico | Categoría: Clásicos
def solve(arr: Seq[Double]): Double = arr.sum
snippets.C0646:
// Caso: Validar RUT chileno | Nivel: Intermedio | Categoría: Validación
def solve(rut: String): Boolean = {
  val clean = rut.replace(".", "").replace("-", "").replace(" ", "").toUpperCase
  if (clean.length < 2) return false

  val body = clean.dropRight(1)
  val dv = clean.takeRight(1)

  if (!body.forall(_.isDigit)) return false

  var sum = 0
  var mul = 2
  for (ch <- body.reverse) {
    sum += (ch - '0') * mul
    mul = if (mul == 7) 2 else (mul + 1)
  }

  val mod = 11 - (sum % 11)
  val dvCalc = if (mod == 11) "0" else if (mod == 10) "K" else mod.toString
  dv == dvCalc
}

snippets.C0651:
// C0651 · Consumir API HTTP (GET y POST JSON) (Intermedio, HTTP)
import java.net.URI
import java.net.http.{HttpClient, HttpRequest, HttpResponse}
import java.time.Duration

def solve(): (String, String) = {
  val client = HttpClient.newBuilder()
    .connectTimeout(Duration.ofSeconds(10))
    .build()

  val getReq = HttpRequest.newBuilder(URI.create("https://httpbin.org/get"))
    .GET().build()
  val getRes = client.send(getReq, HttpResponse.BodyHandlers.ofString())

  val postReq = HttpRequest.newBuilder(URI.create("https://httpbin.org/post"))
    .timeout(Duration.ofSeconds(10))
    .header("Content-Type","application/json")
    .POST(HttpRequest.BodyPublishers.ofString("{"hello":"world"}"))
    .build()
  val postRes = client.send(postReq, HttpResponse.BodyHandlers.ofString())

  // Nota: parse JSON con ujson/circe si quieres estructurar.
  (getRes.body(), postRes.body())
}
